Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mild anemia (low hemoglobin), slightly elevated chloride, high platelet distribution width, low urine specific gravity, and acidic urine pH. These may reflect mild dehydration, early anemia, or age-related changes. No evidence of infection or renal dysfunction. Clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.
